Fortigate Firewall Course Outline
========================

1. Introduction to Fortinet and FortiOS
    - Fortinet Overview
    - Understanding FortiOS and Key Features
    - Fortinet Security Fabric Architecture

2. Basic Firewall Concepts
    - Understanding Firewall Policies
    - Security Profiles Configuration
    - Logging and Monitoring Basics

3. Network Address Translation (NAT)
    - Source NAT Configuration with single LAN Network 
    - Source NAT Configuration with  Multiple  LAN Network
    - Source NAT Configuration with Cisco layer2 Switch for Multiple Vlan Network
    - Destination NAT Configuration (Public Servers Over Internet) 
    - NAT Rules and Troubleshooting

4 . Web Proxy and loadbalancing
    - Web proxy server theory
    - Configure fortigate web proxy 
    - Configure server loadbalancing
    - Configure Interface aggregation 
       
5 . User Authentication
     - User Groups and Authentication Methods
     - Captive Portal Configuration
     - Integration with External Authentication Servers

6. Virtual Private Networks (VPN)
     - Introduction to IPsec and SSL VPNs
     - VPN Configuration
     - VPN Troubleshooting

7. FortiGate Routing
     - Static Routing
     - Policy-Based Routing
     - Dynamic Routing Protocols Overview

8. High Availability (HA)
     - HA Concepts and Modes
     - HA Configuration and Synchronization
     - Failover and Troubleshooting

9. Advanced Threat Protection
     - FortiGuard Services Overview
     - Web Filtering, Application Control, 
and Antivirus
     - Intrusion Prevention System (IPS)

10. FortiGate Management and Maintenance
     - FortiManager Basics
     - Firmware Management
     - Backup and Restore Configurations

11. Troubleshooting Techniques
      - Common FortiGate Issues
      - Diagnostic Tools and Commands
      - Logs and Reports

Key Topics Covered in the CCNA Course
1. Network Fundamentals:
ð¹Understanding the OSI and TCP/IP models
ð¹Basic networking concepts and terminology
ð¹Network topologies and protocols (Ethernet, IPv4, IPv6)

2. Network Access:
ð¹LAN switching and Virtual Local Area Networks (VLANs)
ð¹Switch configuration and management
ð¹Wireless LANs and basic wireless security

3. IP Connectivity:
ð¹IP addressing and subnetting
ð¹Routing protocols (OSPF, EIGRP)
ð¹Inter-VLAN routing and router configuration

4. IP Services:
ð¹Network Address Translation (NAT) and Dynamic Host Configuration Protocol (DHCP)
ð¹Configuring and troubleshooting IP services
ð¹Security measures for network devices

5. Security Fundamentals:
ð¹Key security concepts (threats, vulnerabilities, and mitigation techniques)
ð¹Device access control and security policies
ð¹Wireless security protocols (WPA, WPA2, WPA3)

6. Automation and Programmability:
ð¹Understanding network automation concepts
ð¹Introduction to APIs and configuration management tools
ð¹Comparing traditional networks with controller-based networking

Fortigate Firewall Course Outline
========================
1. Introduction to Fortinet and FortiOS
    - Fortinet Overview
    - Understanding FortiOS and Key Features
    - Fortinet Security Fabric Architecture
2. Basic Firewall Concepts
    - Understanding Firewall Policies
    - Security Profiles Configuration
    - Logging and Monitoring Basics
3. Network Address Translation (NAT)
    - Source NAT Configuration with single LAN Network 
    - Source NAT Configuration with  Multiple  LAN Network
    - Source NAT Configuration with Cisco layer2 Switch for Multiple Vlan Network
    - Destination NAT Configuration (Public Servers Over Internet) 
    - NAT Rules and Troubleshooting
4 . Web Proxy and loadbalancing
    - Web proxy server theory
    - Configure fortigate web proxy 
    - Configure server loadbalancing
    - Configure Interface aggregation 
5 . User Authentication
     - User Groups and Authentication Methods
     - Captive Portal Configuration
     - Integration with External Authentication Servers
6. Virtual Private Networks (VPN)
     - Introduction to IPsec and SSL VPNs
     - VPN Configuration
     - VPN Troubleshooting
7. FortiGate Routing
     - Static Routing
     - Policy-Based Routing
     - Dynamic Routing Protocols Overview
8. High Availability (HA)
     - HA Concepts and Modes
     - HA Configuration and Synchronization
     - Failover and Troubleshooting
9. Advanced Threat Protection
     - FortiGuard Services Overview
     - Web Filtering, Application Control, 
and Antivirus
     - Intrusion Prevention System (IPS)
10. FortiGate Management and Maintenance
     - FortiManager Basics
     - Firmware Management
     - Backup and Restore Configurations
11. Troubleshooting Techniques
      - Common FortiGate Issues
      - Diagnostic Tools and Commands
      - Logs and Reports
